rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL HAWBECKER VS. SCARBOROUGH INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 14, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HAWBECKER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication DENIED. Plaintiffs' Motion for Summary Adjudication to each of Defendants' Affirmative Defenses is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. Summary adjudication is GRANTED as to the following defenses: retaliation; discrimination; breach of the rental agreement; failure to state a cause of action; laches; estoppel; and unclean hands. Summary adjudication is DENIED as to Defendants' affirmative defense for failure to comply with the Rent Ordinance because questions remain as to whether relocation expenses were tendered, and if not, whether they were required by law. = (501/RAK) (late tentative)

rulings.Case Title: ANNABELLE ANIDO VS. EDWIN J LINDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 14, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANTs EDWIN LINDO and EDWIN LINDO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. The Complaint states a cause of action; it is not impermissibly uncertain. Defendants must file an Answer within 5 days of this order being filed. = (501/RAK) (late tentative)
